description: TAM + recovery loss + gradient-contrastive. Test if recovery synergizes with GC mining.
notes: Test synergy between recovery and GC mining. Loss = L_mse(pos) + 0.05 * L_gc(pos,neg) + 0.1 * L_mse(rec). Compare to q223A to isolate recovery vs interaction effect. Baseline: q220 val_mse=0.009728±0.000016.
